creator: luzpaz@pm.me
text:
Can we please remove the 'g' from the multimedia/olive port name: 'g20190414'
+ olive needs an update: 
https://github.com/olive-editor/olive/releases/tag/0.1.1
Per the README: 
NOTE: It is strongly discouraged to use or compile the master branch in its current state as it's under heavy restructuring. Please use the 0.1.x code from the "Releases" tab instead.
